rule.name: Ensure That Instances Are Not Configured To Use the Default Service Account With Full Access to All Cloud APIs
rule.description: To support principle of least privileges and prevent potential privilege escalation it is recommended that instances are not assigned to default service account `Compute Engine default service account` with Scope `Allow full access to all Cloud APIs`.
rule.impact: Non-compliance with CIS Google Cloud Platform Foundation 4.2 — Ensure That Instances Are Not Configured To Use the Default Service Account With Full Access to All Cloud APIs
rule.remediation: Remediate per CIS Google Cloud Platform Foundation v2.0.0 section 4.2.

message: [cis_gcp/4.2] failed: Ensure That Instances Are Not Configured To Use the Default Service Account With Full Access to All Cloud APIs
